task_description: Complete UI overhaul of the WearCast frontend to make it look polished, modern, and presentation-ready for a live demo. Includes redesigned theme, auth pages, home page, chat interface, and micro-interactions.

verification.summary: TypeScript compilation and Vite bundling succeed. 23.66 KB CSS output. No test framework in frontend, so test_quality skipped. No Dockerfile for frontend. Review feedback addressed: brand link uses Link component, send button shows spinner during loading, connection status only renders after session exists, unused spacing tokens removed.
